{{Quote|Thought I recognized that jet juice you call cologne, Solo.|Grunts to Han Solo|<ref name="TG" />}}
'''Grunts''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] owned by [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], before being won by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|Sabacc]]. Solo set Grunts free as soon as they left the [[Lucky Despot]]. Solo hired Grunts to help with cargo, but he and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] didn't get along, Solo was forced to let Grunts go.<ref name="TG" />

Grunts then became a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] for [[Mawbo Kem]] and was later freed. To buy himself passage off planet, Grunts then worked for Kem. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8.5 ABY]] Grunts saw Solo and his new [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and was present when the ''[[Killik Twilight]]'' was stolen by [[Kitster Chanchani Banai]] in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa's]] "performance hall". Grunts then helped the Solos by bringing them to an apartment with a vantage point of the Banai household and acting as lookout. Grunts spent at least twelve [[Standard year/Legends|years]] on Tatooine, which was evidenced by his twelve seclusion braids in 8 ABY.<ref name="TG" />
